description_long: This is a row of four modern, two-story townhouses set on a rectangular grassy plot with a paved road and sidewalk running along one edge. Each house features a flat, dark gabled roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, white facade with subtle trim. The front yards are landscaped with small shrubs and a few trees, and there are paved walkways leading to each entryway. The houses are closely spaced, sharing side walls, and each has a small porch or stoop at the entrance. A single red car is parked on the street, emphasizing the urban residential context. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with an emphasis on symmetry and efficient land use.
description: A row of four modern, two-story white townhouses with gabled roofs, large windows, and landscaped front yards along a paved street.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the townhouse row, the gabled roofs, and the landscaped yards with a sidewalk and road in the background.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical facades, entryways, large windows, and the car parked on the street.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the rear or side elevations, rooflines, and the proximity to the road.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear facades, backyards, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entryways with small porches, steps, and minimal decorative elements
